rule_metadata.author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Hieu Tran
rule_metadata.title: Potential DLL File Download Via PowerShell Invoke-WebRequest

rules.rule_text:
title: Potential DLL File Download Via PowerShell Invoke-WebRequest
id: 0f0450f3-8b47-441e-a31b-15a91dc243e2
status: test
description: Detects potential DLL files being downloaded using the PowerShell Invoke-WebRequest
  or Invoke-RestMethod cmdlets.
references:
- https://www.zscaler.com/blogs/security-research/onenote-growing-threat-malware-distribution
author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Hieu Tran
date: 2023-03-13
modified: 2025-07-18
tags:
- attack.command-and-control
- attack.execution
- attack.t1059.001
- attack.t1105
logsource:
  product: windows
  category: process_creation
detection:
  selection:
    CommandLine|contains:
    - 'Invoke-RestMethod '
    - 'Invoke-WebRequest '
    - 'IRM '
    - 'IWR '
    CommandLine|contains|all:
    - http
    - OutFile
    - .dll
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: medium
